purpose: compact proof that exporter/importer provenance becomes the immutable push base for preflight, remote snapshot hash listing, dry-run plan upload, batched apply, journal inspect, and inspect-first recovery on one remote source site, one imported local site, and one later drift observation of the same remote identity

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

pull_to_push_mapping.push_preflight: binds the persisted pull base package to one live remote identity and one short-lived push session
pull_to_push_mapping.push_snapshot_hashes: lists the live remote comparison surface for planning only and never becomes write authority
pull_to_push_mapping.push_plan_dry_run: uploads the canonical dry-run plan and returns an eligibility receipt, not a lock
pull_to_push_mapping.push_batch_apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
pull_to_push_mapping.push_journal: records durable evidence without authorizing mutation
pull_to_push_mapping.push_recover inspect: reads the journal and fresh live hashes before any mutating recovery branch

auth_and_session.required_floor: at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
auth_and_session.preflight_binding: mints one short-lived push session bound to one remote identity and one persisted pull base
auth_and_session.mutating_calls: dry-run, apply, and mutating recovery require the push session, canonical push signature, and idempotency key

journal_and_recovery.journal_inspect: reads durable claim, lease, fencing, and apply-boundary evidence without authorizing mutation
journal_and_recovery.recovery_inspect: classifies finish, rollback, retry, or block before any mutating repair
journal_and_recovery.lease_fence: claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
journal_and_recovery.revalidation: mutating recovery still requires fresh live hashes plus journal evidence

proof: remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
local-edited is the imported local site derived from the persisted pull base package
runner owns preflight, remote snapshot hash listing, dry-run plan upload, batch apply, journal inspect, and recovery
dry-run and apply remain separate remote calls
apply revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy
remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity at different times
local-edited is the imported local site derived from the persisted pull base package
runner uses the same route names as Docker
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy
dry-run and apply remain separate remote calls
apply revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary

required_invariants: pull exporter/importer establish the immutable base package before push
preflight binds the persisted pull base package to one live remote identity and one short-lived push session
remote snapshot hash listing is planning evidence and never write authority
dry-run and apply are separate remote operations
apply must revalidate the live remote before every batch and at the storage boundary
journal inspection is read-only and never authorizes mutation by itself
recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair
authentication must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy
